messages.content:
The following two elements consist of an ID number, a type and a corresponding descriptive text:
 
36516, disease, name: mononeuritis simplex. type: disease. source: MONDO. details: mondo_name: mononeuritis simplex. mondo_definition: Neuritis of a single nerve. relations: parent-child: {disease: (neuritis, mononeuropathy, mononeuritis of lower limb, upper limb mononeuronitis),}. 
36478, disease, name: nervous system disorder. type: disease. source: MONDO. details: mondo_name: nervous system disorder. mondo_definition: A non-neoplastic or neoplastic disorder that affects the brain, spinal cord, or peripheral nerves. umls_description: Diseases of any component of the brain or the spinal cord. relations: contraindication: {drug: (Meperidine, Phenylephrine, Codeine, Dextromethorphan, Nalidixic acid),}. parent-child: {disease: (stiff-person syndrome, anxiety disorder, orthostatic hypotension, Worster-Drought syndrome, symmetrical thalamic calcifications, perineural cyst, serotonin syndrome, locked-in syndrome, neuroleptic malignant syndrome, spontaneous periodic hypothermia, genetic nervous system disorder, congenital nervous system disorder, movement disorder, central nervous system disease, autoimmune disease of the nervous system, peripheral nervous system disease, complex neurodevelopmental disorder, psychiatric disorder, nervous system neoplasm, neuromuscular disease, perceptual disorders, infectious disease of the nervous system, neurosarcoidosis, neurovascular disease, retinal disease, cranial nerve neuropathy, neurocutaneous syndrome, sensory ganglionopathy, disease by anatomical system, neuroendocrine disease, paraneoplastic neurologic syndrome, inherited nervous system cancer-predisposing syndrome, developmental disability, multiple sclerosis variant, encephalopathy, specific learning disability, nervous system injury, drug-induced dyskinesia, beriberi, exercise-induced malignant hyperthermia, drug-induced akathisia, neuronitis, diplegia of upper limb, Barre-Lieou syndrome, Gerstmann syndrome, neonatal brainstem dysfunction, idiopathic recurrent stupor, chronic lymphocytic inflammation with pontine perivascular enhancement responsive to steroids {xref="Orphanet:284448"}, Balint syndrome, persistent idiopathic facial pain, radiculitis, Wallerian degeneration),}. linked_to: {exposure: (Carbon Monoxide, Organophosphates, Hydrocarbons, Chlorinated),}. 

Find out which of the elements satisfies the following query better: 
Please list diseases related to polyradiculoneuropathy that affect multiple spinal nerve roots and share a similar or subordinate pathophysiological relationship. 
Return ONLY the corresponding ID number which corresponds to the element that satisfies the given query best. Nothing else.
